title: A Walk in Rome
content: Marcus spent an afternoon walking through the streets of Rome without a strict plan. Around every corner, he discovered historic buildings, fountains, and lively squares filled with visitors. He stopped frequently to take photos and admire the architecture. At lunchtime, he found a small restaurant and ordered pasta recommended by the waiter. Afterward, he continued exploring narrow streets lined with shops and cafés. The city felt like an open-air museum full of stories from the past. Marcus enjoyed every moment of the walk and wished he had more time to explore.
